testCases.testName: AI response with bold text, verify **bold** renders as bold, not as asterisks
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 216-222: ReactMarkdown component with strong tag styling (font-bold class). Markdown **bold** syntax is converted to <strong> elements with proper CSS styling.

testCases.testName: AI response with list, verify bullet points render correctly, not as dashes
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 155-160: Unordered lists (<ul>) rendered with list-disc list-inside classes, ensuring proper bullet point display. Markdown dashes (-) are converted to HTML bullets.

testCases.testName: AI response with code block, verify syntax highlighting applied
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 69-82: Code blocks detected with language-* regex and rendered using CodeBlock component. CodeBlock.tsx line 124-142: Uses react-syntax-highlighter with Prism and vscDarkPlus theme for proper syntax highlighting.

testCases.testName: AI response with link, verify link is clickable and opens in new tab
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 96-108: Links rendered with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security. CSS class 'text-primary hover:underline' provides visual styling.

testCases.testName:
AI sends raw HTML `

Test

`, verify sanitized and displays 'Test' without tags
testCases.verificationDetails: Backend: gemini_service.py line 618-630 converts HTML to Markdown using markdownify library, stripping script/style tags. Frontend: messageFormatter.tsx line 34-45 sanitizes HTML using DOMPurify with ALLOWED_TAGS whitelist, removing dangerous elements.

testCases.testName: Long message spanning multiple paragraphs, verify displayed in single chat bubble
testCases.verificationDetails:
messageFormatter.tsx line 146-152: Paragraphs (

) rendered with mb-2 spacing, allowing multiple paragraphs within single message. Backend gemini_service.py line 297-372: Streaming responses accumulated in full_response array and sent as complete message, preventing fragmentation.

testCases.testName: AI response with numbered list, verify numbers render correctly (1., 2., 3.)
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 164-170: Ordered lists (<ol>) rendered with list-decimal list-inside classes, ensuring proper numeric display (1., 2., 3.).

testCases.testName: Verify no message fragmentation (no split messages across multiple bubbles)
testCases.verificationDetails: Backend gemini_service.py line 324-372: Streaming chunks accumulated in full_response list, complete message saved to conversation history. Non-streaming mode line 252-284: Returns complete formatted_response. Message buffering prevents fragmentation.

testCases.testName: AI response with table data, verify rendered as clean table, not raw JSON
testCases.verificationDetails: Backend gemini_service.py line 633-641: JSON data detected and converted to markdown table format using _format_json_as_markdown_table(). Frontend messageFormatter.tsx line 112-143: Tables rendered with proper styling via ReactMarkdown remarkGfm plugin. DataTable.tsx provides additional table parsing.

testCases.testName: Code block with Python syntax, verify syntax highlighting matches language
testCases.verificationDetails: CodeBlock.tsx line 78-90: normalizeLanguage() maps language aliases (py->python). Line 124-142: SyntaxHighlighter uses normalized language prop for accurate Prism-based syntax highlighting.

testCases.testName: Copy code block, verify copy button copies code without line numbers
testCases.verificationDetails: CodeBlock.tsx line 55-75: handleCopy() uses navigator.clipboard.writeText(code) passing raw code prop, not rendered HTML. Line 124: showLineNumbers prop is separate from copy functionality, ensuring only code content is copied.

testCases.testName: Message with inline code `variable`, verify backticks render as inline code style
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 85-92: Inline code (inline=true) rendered with <code> tag and CSS classes 'px-1.5 py-0.5 text-sm bg-muted text-foreground rounded font-mono' providing distinct styling.

testCases.testName: XSS attempt `<script>alert('xss')</script>`, verify sanitized and not executed
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 34-45: DOMPurify.sanitize() with ALLOWED_TAGS whitelist excludes 'script' tags. Backend gemini_service.py line 625: markdownify strip=['script', 'style'] removes script elements. Multi-layer XSS protection ensures scripts are never executed.

testCases.testName: Markdown headings (##), verify render as proper heading elements with styling
testCases.verificationDetails: messageFormatter.tsx line 182-204: Headings (h1, h2, h3) rendered with proper CSS classes (text-2xl/xl/lg font-bold/semibold) and spacing (mb-2 mt-4/3/2). Backend gemini_service.py line 623: HTML headings converted to ATX-style markdown (# ##) by markdownify.

executionNotes: All tests validated through comprehensive code analysis of implementation files
Tests are classified as 'manual' as they require UI interaction for complete end-to-end validation
Code analysis confirms all S5-009 requirements are fully implemented:
- XSS prevention (multi-layer: markdownify script stripping + DOMPurify)
- Complete integration in AIChatInterface via formatChatMessage()
Backend format_response() function verified in gemini_service.py:596-643
Frontend messageFormatter.tsx verified with all required components
CodeBlock.tsx provides syntax highlighting with copy functionality
DataTable.tsx provides markdown table parsing and rendering
All 14 test requirements have corresponding implementation code
S2-004 source citations preserved via preprocessSourceCitations() function
